module.name: core
module.purpose: Agent preprocessing, computation flow, pass-through transports, and model backend interfaces.

files.purpose: Defines the core runtime and internal preprocessing, transport, and model contracts.

items.name: Preprocessor
items.details: Converts CLI user commands into prompt tokens and normalized assets.

items.name: ModelBackend
items.details: Backend model contract with remote-first and local-compatible implementations.

items.name: AgentCore
items.details: Runs preprocessing, pass-through transports, and model invocation.
implements: AgentCore::run orchestrates UserCoreTransport, Preprocessor, ComputeModelTransport, and ModelBackend
